body: Amara, just wanted to follow up on our conversation from earlier this week about the [Halfway Capital](org/halfway-capital) deal flow you mentioned — specifically the two climate infrastructure plays you're evaluating at the seed stage. I've been thinking more about the grid-edge storage company, and I think there's a real angle worth exploring if they're open to a strategic co-investor alongside your lead. My fund isn't the right fit size-wise, but I have a couple of LPs who've been vocal about wanting more exposure to that space and might be worth an intro. Let me know if it makes sense to get on a call early next week — happy to work around your schedule given how slammed September tends to get.
